title: alternanthera kurtzii subsp. kurtzii
intro: Alternanthera kurtzii subsp. kurtzii, also known as Red Calico or Alternanthera, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Amaranthaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alternanthera kurtzii subsp. kurtzii include reducing fever, treating skin infections, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
